query: Show the daily active seats trend for Adobe across November 2024. Return date and daily active seat count ordered by date.
gold_sql: SELECT DATE(event_date) AS date, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS active_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND event_date < '2024-12-01' GROUP BY DATE(event_date) ORDER BY date ASC
